description: Enchant your wardrobe with our white frilly socks, where elegance meets comfort. This stunning four-pair collection is the epitome of poise, suited for women and girls alike who have an eye for charming fashion touches. - Each pack includes 4 pairs of white frilly socks, accented with a fairy lace trim and glamorous bows. - Thanks to their durable and soft fabric, they provide both longevity and a gentle touch against your skin. - The frilly ankle socks are versatile enough for any event, be it a relaxed day out, part of your dance attire, or adding that extra flair to a wedding or party outfit. Specifications: - Material: cotton - Size: one size - Colour: white Package Includes: - 4 Pairs of White Frilly Socks Notes: - To maintain the quality and feel of your socks, please wash them at a low temperature and avoid the use of bleach. Air drying is recommended to preserve the delicate lace details. - Please confirm your size before purchase to ensure the fit and satisfaction with our product. Step into a world of elegance with these Frilly Socks, and experience the blend of fashion and comfort. Whether it's an everyday choice or for a special event, our socks are sure to enhance your outfit with a sprinkle of whimsy and grace.
